Title: Cleaning House
Hunting Party
Eliminate a Problem
Eliminate [TargetName]
Description:
Looking for someone who doesn't mind getting their hands dirty. Not talking guild work or anything, just someone who's good enough to aim and squeeze. Got some good creds available to see [TargetName] permanently gone. 

Start looking at [Location]. [MultiPlayer]SENDER NOT FOUND [Danger]

Got a mess that needs cleaning up. Paying solid credits for it too. The mess goes by the name of [TargetName]. [Danger] 

Buddy of mine saw them around [Location], but the rest is up to you. [MultiPlayer] SENDER NOT FOUND

There's a price on [TargetName]'s head. [MultiPlayer]Credits go to whoever bags the bastard first. SENDER NOT FOUND I'd recommend starting at [Location] but hey, don't let me tell you how to do your job. [Danger]

Guess who just got themselves placed onto the 'no-breathe-list'? Some dragger named [TargetName]. Yeah, I never heard of them either, but better them than us, right? 

[Danger] [MultiPlayer]Word is they've been haunting [Location] lately, so you'll probably want to start there. SENDER NOT FOUNDGood luck.

I don't know what [TargetName] did, but they sure pissed off the wrong people. Credits go to whoever can give them a last lesson in manners straight through the head. [Danger] 

There isn't much to go on, just some scattered sightings around [Location], so maybe start there. SENDER NOT FOUND[MultiPlayer]One last thing, the client wants you to say '[Phrase].' when the trigger's pulled. Don't ask. Just do it.

[TargetName] is breathing borrowed air. Time's come to punch their ticket for good. SENDER NOT FOUND I can give you [Location] but you have to provide your own transport and clean weapons. [Danger] [MultiPlayer]
Timed: You will have a very specific window of opportunity. Take them down before they disappear again.
Target will be aware of bounty, so you'll have to move fast.
